title: potentilla caulescens subsp. djurjurae
intro: Potentilla caulescens subsp. djurjurae is a rare and endemic species of flowering plant, belonging to the family Rosaceae. It is commonly found in the Djurjura Mountains of Algeria. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat wounds and skin irritations due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal problems, and is also used to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
